title: Intense Italian Wood Ear Mushroom Risotto
description: A winey, tender one‑pot risotto bursting with wood ear mushrooms and confit tomato, served as a suppli‑style snack or dinner.

ingredients.name: wood ear mushrooms
ingredients.notes: soaked in warm water for 10 min

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add diced onion and sauté until translucent.
Stir in minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add wood ear mushrooms and cook for 2 minutes.
Pour in white wine, letting it reduce until almost dry.
Stir in arborio rice, coating each grain with wine and oil.
Add confit tomato and stir to combine.
Gradually pour in vegetable broth, one ladle at a time, stirring constantly until the liquid is absorbed.
Continue adding broth and stirring until the rice is creamy and al dente, about 15 to 18 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper, stir in fresh basil and grated parmesan, and serve warm as a suppli‑style dish.
